texto: Not Every Battle You Lose is considered as a loss sometimes this loss leads to the best victory, You just have to be Patient and to take advantage Of every unexpected event that happened during your struggle your own war .
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ahmed sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Not Every Battle You Lose is considered as a loss sometimes this loss leads to the best victory, …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, passion, every, útil em momentos de luto e reflexao.
